title: Null checks should not be combined with is operator checks
description: Null checks should not be combined with "is" operator checksAnalyze your codeintentionality-clearmaintainabilityCode SmellQuick FixIDE quick fixes available with SonarQube for IDEredundantWhy is this an issue?There’s no need to null test in conjunction with anistest.nullis not an instance of anything, so a null check is redundant.Noncompliant code exampleif (x != null && x is MyClass) { ... } // Noncompliant if (x == null || !(x is MyClass)) { ... } // NoncompliantCompliant solutionif (x is MyClass) { ..
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

logic.triggering_conditions: MethodDeclaration nodes that contain redundant null checks combined with is operator patterns
logic.reasoning: Detects redundant null checks combined with is operator. The is operator already handles null checks, so patterns like 'x != null && x is Type' or 'x == null || !(x is Type)' are redundant. Uses regex to match these specific patterns within method bodies while excluding safe contexts like logging and testing.

should_trigger: if (obj != null && obj is MyClass myInstance)
should_not_trigger: [Test] public void Test() { Assert.IsTrue(x != null && x is string); }
